mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 1.0% signals monetary accommodation that reduces equity discount rates and increases present value of future corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns when FEDFUNDS < 1.0% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in total nonfarm payroll employment above 150,000 persons signals robust labor market momentum that supports consumer spending and corporate earnings growth, triggering positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS increases > 150,000 persons in prior month
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with strong labor demand
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in fewer than 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any rolling 18-month window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in housing starts below 1,200 thousand units combined with stagnant retail sales signals weakening demand-side momentum, indicating reduced future corporate revenue growth and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST < 1,200 AND RSAFS growth rate < 0.5% month-over-month for 2 consecutive months
regime_hint: demand-side slowdown or early recession warning
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in fewer than 50% of triggered instances, or the joint signal (both conditions met) shows Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in industrial production below 103.5 index points signals supply-side contraction and reduced manufacturing capacity utilization, which constrains corporate profit margins and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns following INDPRO declines are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the unemployment rate above 4.7% combined with declining payroll employment signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer confidence and spending, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.2pp month-over-month AND PAYEMS declines in same month
regime_hint: labor market deterioration or early-stage recession
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20-day returns in fewer than 52% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of the joint signal < 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the consumer price index above 3.5% year-over-year combined with elevated federal funds rates above 2.5% signals persistent inflation and monetary tightening that compresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with elevated inflation
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in fewer than 50% of triggered instances, or the joint signal shows Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A quarter-over-quarter increase in real GDP above 0.5% signals robust economic expansion and rising corporate earnings expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion quarters are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in retail sales above 0.8% combined with rising housing starts above 1,350 thousand units signals strong consumer demand and housing market momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS increases > 0.8% month-over-month AND HOUST > 1,350 thousand units
regime_hint: demand-side acceleration with strong consumer and housing activity
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in fewer than 58% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of the joint signal < 0.03 over any rolling 18-month window.
